DIV8.HEAD: § 164.308 Administrative safeguards.
DIV8.P: (a)(1) Security management process. Implement policies and procedures.
(a)(4) Information access management. Implement policies and procedures for authorizing access to electronic protected health information.

DIV8.HEAD: § 164.312 Technical safeguards.
DIV8.P: (a)(1) Access control. Implement technical policies and procedures.
(a)(2)(i) Unique user identification. Assign a unique name and/or number for identifying and tracking user identity.
